quality_analysis.details: Revenue growth is positive but under 50% cumulatively (39.5%).; Operating margins have often exceeded 15% (indicates good profitability).; Majority of periods show positive free cash flow.; High ROE of 34.1%, indicating a competitive advantage.

activism_analysis.details: No clear sign of activism opportunity (either margins are already decent or growth is weak).
